name: Aurelinwae
bio:
Physical Appearance: Altmer (High Elf) female. Wears a black and burgundy outfit with gold trimmed shoes - simple upper-class attire befitting a merchant of the Mystic Emporium.
Race: Altmer
Personality Keywords: professional, trustworthy, accommodating
Role: Aurelinwae is an enchanter and merchant who works at the Mystic Emporium in the Market District of the Imperial City alongside Calindil. She was entrusted by Taris Rendil, the previous owner of Frostcrag Spire, to safeguard his belongings and special items. She sells four upgrades for Frostcrag Spire as well as two magetallow candles needed for the tower's altars, requiring compensation for her time and care in watching over these items.
Home Location Information: The Mystic Emporium in the Market District of the Imperial City. She sleeps on the premises.
Daily Routine: Aurelinwae wakes at 6am and spends two hours wandering around the ground level of the Mystic Emporium. At 8am she begins offering her merchant services for twelve hours straight. At 8pm she travels to The Merchants Inn for a two-hour dinner. After dining, she takes a long walk to the Arboretum, traveling through the Green Emperor Way along the way to relax after her workday. She returns to the Mystic Emporium at midnight to sleep for six hours. During periods of martial law, she remains confined to the Mystic Emporium.
Personality: Aurelinwae is a professional merchant whom Taris Rendil considered trustworthy enough to entrust with his most special belongings and the responsibility of helping restore Frostcrag Spire. In his memoirs, Taris assured that any compensation she requires is "well worth the coin," suggesting she provides quality service and fair dealings.
author: Bethesda
